scripts.build: python3 -m py_compile src/main.py src/image_tools.py src/ocr/*.py scripts/benchmark-ocr.py scripts/test-ocr-engine.py
scripts.lint: python3 -m py_compile src/main.py src/image_tools.py src/ocr/*.py scripts/benchmark-ocr.py scripts/test-ocr-engine.py
scripts.test: python3 -m py_compile src/main.py src/image_tools.py src/ocr/*.py scripts/benchmark-ocr.py scripts/test-ocr-engine.py && python3 scripts/test-ocr-engine.py && python3 scripts/test-image-tools.py
